title: helichrysum sessilioides
intro: Helichrysum sessilioides, also known as Everlasting Dill, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Helichrysum sessilioides include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
